use_cases: Creating ghost buttons for secondary actions
Implementing navigation links styled as buttons
ai_summary: A reusable Button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Built with Radix UI Slot for composition, class-variance-authority for variant management, and full accessibility support including focus rings and disabled states. Tailwind CSS styling with ring-offset for consistent theming.
